data.title: Maryland man sentenced to 15 months for helping North Korean hackers infiltrate US tech firms
data.description:
A man in Maryland has been sentenced to a 15-month prison sentence and three years of supervised release after a revelation that he has been helping North Korea to place IT workers inside US companies covertly. For a cool 3 years, Minh Phuong Ngoc Vong used false credentials to secure jobs with at least 13 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/maryland-man-sentenced-to-15-months-for-helping-north-korean-hackers-infiltrate-us-tech-firms/

data.description:

data.title: Trump's National Security Strategy Gives Reality Check to Crypto's Low Interest Rate Obsession
data.description:
"Former President Trump's National Security Strategy provides a sobering reality check to the cryptocurrency market's ongoing fixation on low interest rates, highlighting how geopolitical considerations and national security concerns can significantly influence economic policies and investor behavior, ultimately urging stakeholders in the crypto space to reconsider their assumptions and strategies in light of a shifting global landscape."
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/05/trump-s-national-strategy-gives-reality-check-to-crypto-s-low-rate-obsession
